node.statement: AXIOM JB1 (approximate submultiplicativity). By GT-easy, ||a•b|| <= (1+C_1 eta)||a|| ||b|| for all a,b in A, with C_1 a universal dimension-free constant. This delivers def-eps-jb-algebra (JB1) ||a o b|| <= (1+eps)||a|| ||b|| with the O(eta) defect C_1 eta (to be absorbed into eps=C sqrt(eta) at node 1.7).
